summary: Plan-mode live PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. All five listed open PRs remain open for maintainer or proof follow-up; one linked security-sensitive issue is routed to central security handling only.

The PR is small and mostly green, but hydrated review-bot findings plus status waiting on author leave an active author/review-followup decision that should not be closed or merged by this plan.
